title: No enforcement that 'date' must appear in the signed headers set
description: The Date freshness check in server.rs:531 happens after signature verification, but there is no check that 'date' appears in the Signature header's headers= parameter. An attacker can: (1) sign only (request-target) and host by setting headers="(request-target) host", (2) include an old or spoofed Date header that is NOT part of the signature, (3) pass signature verification (Date is not in the signed string so tampering it does not break the sig), (4) then the freshness check fires on the spoofed Date — but since the Date is unsigned, the attacker can set it to the current time to pass. The fix is to require that 'date' appears in the signed headers set; reject if it is absent. This closes the replay window intended by the freshness check.
close_reason: Fixed: redirect::Policy::none on all clients, require Digest+Date headers, corrected body limit comment
